title: lamium garganicum subsp. nepetifolium
intro: Lamium garganicum subsp. nepetifolium, also known as Nepeta-like Lamium, is a plant species in the mint family that is native to the Mediterranean region. This herb has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects, making it useful for treating digestive issues and relieving pain. The health benefits of Lamium garganicum subsp. nepetifolium include reducing symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as alleviating menstrual cramps and other women's health issues. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
